page_content:
Notes:

At the time of application students must have 30 university credits

completed (including transfer credit), a minimum cumulative GPA of a 3.0, and at least 3 semesters remaining prior to graduation

Upon admission to the minor students will become part of the Honors

College and are subject to its policies

Students must maintain a 3.0 cumulative GPA to remain in good

standing in the minor per Honors College requirements

All courses used to satisfy the requirements of the minor must be

completed with a grade of “C-” or better

A maximum of 2 courses may be used to satisfy the requirements of
